creator: rflynn@acsalaska.net
text:
On 9-5-2012 20:17, scheidell@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Q: does this slave use the same rc script as master? Q: can you install
> both of these or should we include CONFLICTS= in Makefiles for both?

They should indeed conflict. New upstream release, so please suspend.
Barring time constraints, I should have a new master port after the weekend.
-- 
Mel
